frame_dimensions: 1600 px wide native (forms), 602 px wide (email templates)
audit_scope_note: The Figma frame names in this section ('Day 1 - Add/delete users', 'Renew landing - uploaded file') are template/working titles that do not reflect actual content. The visible content is a variant set of the Precious Metals Buy/Sell trade flow, with new content for: (a) new-account-creation on first buy, (b) cross-currency sell (XAU → USD), (c) insufficient-holdings warning state, (d) account-opened acknowledgement variant. This audit reports what is on the pixels.

screens.role: Precious Metals overview — empty holdings, illustration + 'Start trading' link
Precious Metals overview — populated holdings + Recent orders table
Buy form — new-account-creation variant ('New [Precious Metal Account] will be created')
Sell form — inline warning 'Quantity exceeds available holdings'
Sell form — cross-currency (XAU → USD credit account)
Buy review with 'A new [Precious Metals account] will be opened' info banner
Buy success + 'Your Precious Metals account has been opened' panel
